---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the protocol or the reference implementation
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**The problem**

What can't be done today, or what is harder than it should be?

**Proposed change**

If it is normative (wire format, signatures, matching, cost model,
reputation), sketch the PROTOCOL.md edit as well as the code change —
every claim in the spec has a test.

**Decentralization check**

FLP admits no required central component (registry, oracle, shared
operator). Explain why the proposal doesn't introduce one.

**Alternatives considered**
